meanings.definition: a barrier consisting of a horizontal bar and supports
material for making rails or rails collectively

examples: rail off the crowds from the Presidential palace
fresh fruit are railed from Italy to Belgium
They railed from Rome to Venice
hundreds of miles were railed out here

meanings.definition: fish with a handline over the rails of a boat
examples: They are railing for fresh fish
The Nazi propaganda vilified the Jews
He fulminated against the Republicans' plan to cut Medicare
She railed against the bad social policies
